overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxury cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077. The player approaches Johnny Silverhand playing guitar in the sunlit living room, then moves to the window overlooking Night City, and finally explores the bedroom area with graffiti-covered walls.

events.description: camera slows approach toward Johnny Silverhand seated on the couch

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward Johnny Silverhand who is seated on the white leather couch playing guitar

notable_agents.action: Johnny Silverhand sitting on white leather couch playing a purple electric guitar

entered.detail: modern white leather sectional sofa with chrome legs positioned against the left wall
large rectangular red carpet covering the central living room floor area
low white coffee table with various items including bottles and magazines
tall glass windows revealing cityscape outside with palm trees visible
dark wood slat wall covering the right side of the room

segments.scene_description: The player stands in a modern luxury apartment living room with red carpet and white leather furniture. Johnny Silverhand sits on the couch playing guitar as the camera approaches. Sunlight streams through the large windows creating dramatic shadows across the floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise apartment with panoramic city view

events.description: moves past Johnny to the large window overlooking Night City
camera turns away from direct sunlight toward the darker interior wall

agents.ego_description: approaching the window to look out at the Night City skyline and streets below

entered.detail: futuristic cityscape with towering skyscrapers and neon signs visible through the window
tall palm tree visible just outside the apartment window
red cylindrical floor pillow lying on the wooden floor near the window
broken glass and trash scattered on the floor near the window corner

segments.scene_description: The player moves to the floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a panoramic view of Night City with palm trees and futuristic skyscrapers. The camera looks down at the curved road below before turning back toward the interior, passing red cushions and debris scattered on the wooden floor.

events.description: moving from window area toward bedroom with large portrait becoming prominent

agents.ego_description: walking along the window wall toward the bedroom area, passing the large artwork

entered.detail: massive framed painting of a figure in red and black tones hanging on the wall
low black entertainment unit beneath the artwork with electronic equipment
modern low-profile bed visible in the background through the doorway

segments.scene_description: The player walks along the wall featuring a large vertical artwork of a figure in red above a media console. The space transitions from living room to bedroom area, with the platform bed becoming visible in the background through the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: bedroom with graffiti wall and neon lighting

events.description: entering the bedroom area with graffiti-covered wall becoming visible
moving into darker bedroom area with neon accent lighting on the walls

agents.ego_description: exploring the bedroom area and examining the graffiti-covered wall with colorful tags

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful neon graffiti tags including ET TU BRUTE and other cyberpunk style writing
dark staircase with steps leading upward to the left side of the room
cardboard box sitting on the floor near the wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters the bedroom area featuring a prominent wall covered in colorful neon graffiti tags. A modern staircase is visible to the left, and the platform bed sits in the center background. The lighting shifts to a darker ambiance with neon accent lighting illuminating the graffiti.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a luxury cyberpunk apartment, transitioning from a sun-drenched living area into a moody, graffiti-laden bedroom. It begins by approaching Johnny Silverhand as he plays guitar amidst white leather furniture and red carpeting, with bright sunlight casting dramatic shadows across the floor. As the camera glides toward the floor-to-ceiling windows, the interior opens up to a panoramic view of Night City's skyscrapers and palm trees before turning back inside to pass scattered debris on the wooden floor. The scene then shifts past a large vertical artwork of a red figure, moving through a doorway that bridges the living space and the sleeping quarters. Finally, the camera enters the bedroom where the bright daylight gives way to a darker ambiance, illuminated by neon accent lighting that highlights colorful graffiti tags on the walls beside a modern staircase and platform bed.
